analyst: Tigress Financial (Partner, CIO, Director of Research)

predicted_questions.question_text: Thanks and congrats on the quarter. Quick question on the pre‑cruise digital experience — you noted over 70% penetration in your pre‑cruise booking engines and that more than half of onboard revenue is booked before guests step on board. Can you walk through exactly how the app/unified intelligence layer integrates with your onboard systems (POS, reservations, loyalty and inventory) and give a concrete example — say spa appointments or specialty dining — of a use‑case where the pre‑cruise flow creates truly incremental revenue rather than just pulling spend forward? 1) How do you measure incrementality (do you run holdouts/A‑B tests or rely on cohort attribution)? 2) Any sense of the typical uplift in spend per guest or attach rate you can point to from those pre‑cruise initiatives? Thanks.
predicted_questions.rationale: Matches the persona's focus on pre‑cruise digital tools and monetization (recurring_concerns.core_topics[0] and [1]) and his evidence‑driven style (reasoning_style.primary_mode). Anchors directly to management's statements that 'over 70% penetration in our pre‑cruise booking engines' and 'more than half of onboard revenue is booked before guests ever step on board' and asks for operational integration and attribution mechanisms.
